'''Gohn Bimmin''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Gohn Bimmin was stationed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] where he sought to discredit [[Eugene Talmont]] and claim that Talmont was involved in a bribery scandal. Eugene tasked a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to assassinate Bimmin, further securing the safety of the [[Imperial Prefect|Prefecture]] from harmful allegations.<ref name="AED" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateThug.png|250px|thumb|Possible depictions of Gohn Bimmin]]
Gohn Bimmin was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="AED" />
